scripts.android:build:debug:fast: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh bash -lc 'cd android && VEX_DEBUG_APPLICATION_ID_SUFFIX=.debug NODE_ENV=development ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug -PreactNativeArchitectures=arm64-v8a -PVEX_ANDROID_FAST_ABI=arm64-v8a'
scripts.eas:build:android:development: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh eas build --platform android --profile development
scripts.eas:build:android:local: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh eas build --platform android --profile local --local
scripts.eas:build:android:preview: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh eas build --platform android --profile preview
scripts.eas:build:android:production: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh eas build --platform android --profile production
scripts.eas:build:ios:development: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh eas build --platform ios --profile development
scripts.eas:build:ios:preview: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh eas build --platform ios --profile preview
scripts.eas:build:ios:production: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh eas build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.ota:publish:preview: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh bash -lc 'NODE_ENV=production VEX_BUILD_PROFILE=preview VEX_UPDATES_ENABLED=1 VEX_OTA_PROVIDER=expo-open-ota EXPO_PUBLIC_VEX_RELEASE_CHANNEL=preview EXPO_PUBLIC_VEX_UPDATE_CHANNEL=preview RELEASE_CHANNEL=preview eoas publish --branch preview --nonInteractive'
scripts.ota:publish:production: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh bash -lc 'NODE_ENV=production VEX_BUILD_PROFILE=production VEX_UPDATES_ENABLED=1 VEX_OTA_PROVIDER=expo-open-ota EXPO_PUBLIC_VEX_RELEASE_CHANNEL=production EXPO_PUBLIC_VEX_UPDATE_CHANNEL=production RELEASE_CHANNEL=production eoas publish --branch production --nonInteractive'
scripts.tauri:build:signed: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh bash -lc 'npm run build:native:macos && set -a; [ ! -f .env.tauri-updater.local ] || . ./.env.tauri-updater.local; set +a; npm run tauri:cli -- build'
scripts.tauri:build:macos:universal-fast: bash scripts/run_with_local_release_cache.sh bash -lc 'npm run build:native:macos && tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin --config '\''{"bundle":{"createUpdaterArtifacts":false}}'\'''
scripts.check: npm run test:unit && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
